questionHtml:
For the following parts of this question, consider the curve y=x3+ax2+b for a∈ℝ, a≠0 and b∈ℝ.

Consider the case where the curve has exactly three x-axis intercepts. State whether each point of zero gradient is located above or below the x-axis.
markschemeHtml:
one point of zero gradient is located on either side (of the x-axis) (or equivalent)                   A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Consider the case where the curve has exactly three x-axis intercepts. State whether each point of zero gradient is located above or below the x-axis.
